title: Hewory Glass Cylinder Vases Set of 6, Tall Clear Glass Vase for Flowers, Hurricane Candle Holder for Pillar Floating Candles, Flower Vase for Table Centrepiece for Wedding Home Decor, 15/20/25cm
features: ELEGANT & STURDY - Made of crystal clear glass, Our clear glass cylinder vases set are sturdy, simple, elegant and modern. When you want the arrangement to stand out more than the vase, then go for these flower vases for living room. They are a perfect accent to a simple or complex arrangement.

BEAUTIFUL & PRACTICAL - These clear cylinder vases for table decorations centrepiece are not only popular with fresh flower or dried floral but also used as tall glass candle holders (pillar candles holder or floating candles holders), pot-pourri containers and centerpieces filled with gems or lights.

MULTIPLE OCCASIONS USE - The glass vases for flowers are great gift for Christmas, thanksgiving, wedding, housewarming, holiday, Mother's Day, birthday and anniversary. Beautiful decor for bookshelves, tables, window sills, countertops, kitchen, dining room, living room, office and more.
STURDY PACKAGE - All tall clear vases for centrepieces are covered with double-layer foam cotton and packed in a strong carton to ensure they are delivered to you in the best condition.

FULL SATISFACTION GUARANTEE - The package includes 6pcs cylinder floating candle vases for centerpieces (Not Include Flowers and Candles). Please reach out to our customer service if you receive broken vase or are not satisfied with them. We will refund you immediately or exchange.
